## PACKAGE INFO
{
  "name": "strategic-learning-unified-theatre",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "description": "Strategic Learning Unified Theatre local project with screen capture, LLM ingestion, and adapter training.",
  "type": "module",
  "main": "./src/cli.js",
  "electron": "./electron-tray/main.js",
  "bin": {
    "strategic-learning-unified-theatre": "./src/cli.js"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "start": "node ./src/cli.js",
    "test": "cross-env VSCODE_ROTATOR_MOCK_LLM=1 NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 vitest run",
    "coverage": "vitest run --coverage",
    "coverage:report": "vitest run --coverage --reporter=html",
    "test:ci": "vitest run --coverage --reporter=verbose",
    "test:integration": "cross-env VSCODE_ROTATOR_MOCK_LLM=0 NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 vitest -c vitest.integration.config.js run",
    "test:serial": "node run-tests.cjs",
    "test:chaos": "node ./scripts/chaos/run-chaos.js",
    "test:chaos:kill-daemon": "node ./scripts/chaos/run-chaos.js --scenario kill-daemon",
    "test:chaos:corrupt-config": "node ./scripts/chaos/run-chaos.js --scenario corrupt-config",
    "test:chaos:burst-load": "node ./scripts/chaos/run-chaos.js --scenario burst-load",
    "test:robot": "robot --outputdir robot-results robot/",
    "test:robot:functional": "robot --outputdir robot-results --suite functional robot/",
    "test:robot:regression": "robot --outputdir robot-results --suite regression robot/",
    "test:robot:nonfunc": "robot --outputdir robot-results --suite non-functional robot/",
    "test:tdd": "node ./src/test-runner.js tdd-check",
    "tray": "electron ./electron-tray/main.js",
    "install-service": "node ./scripts/install.js",
    "ui:dev": "vite",
    "ui:build": "vite build",
    "electron:dev": "npm run ui:build && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron ./electron-ui/main.cjs",
    "electron:build": "npm run ui:build && electron-builder",
    "dist:win": "electron-builder --win nsis",
    "dist:linux": "electron-builder --linux AppImage",
    "dist:all": "electron-builder -mwl",
    "dist": "npm run dist:all",
    "validate:governance": "node scripts/validate-governance-config.mjs",
    "sonar:validate-waivers": "node scripts/validate-waivers.mjs",
    "sonar:reconcile": "node scripts/reconcile-hotspot-register.mjs",
    "sonar:check": "node scripts/check-sonar-readiness.mjs",
    "sonar:scan": "echo 'not implemented'",
    "sonar:wait": "echo 'not implemented'",
    "sonar:export": "echo 'not implemented'"
  },
  "engines": {
    "node": ">=18"
  },
  "build": {
    "appId": "com.strategiclearning.unifiedtheatre",
    "productName": "UnifiedTheatre",
    "extraMetadata": {
      "main": "electron-ui/main.cjs"
    },
    "directories": {
      "output": "release"
    },
    "files": [
      "electron-ui/dist/**/*",
      "electron-ui/main.cjs",
      "electron-ui/preload.cjs",
      "electron-ui/ipc/**/*",
      "src/**/*",
      "package.json"
    ],
    "publish": [
      {
        "provider": "generic",
        "url": "https://updates.example.com/unifiedtheatre"
      }
    ],
    "generateUpdatesFilesForAllChannels": true,
    "win": {
      "target": [
        "nsis"
      ],
      "publisherName": [
        "Your Company, Inc."
      ],
      "artifactName": "${productName}-Setup-${version}.${ext}"
    },
    "linux": {
      "target": [
        "AppImage",
        "deb"
      ],
      "category": "Utility",
      "artifactName": "${productName}-${version}-${os}-${arch}.${ext}"
    },
    "icon": "build/icon.ico"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "ajv": "^8.12.0",
    "better-sqlite3": "^12.10.0",
    "chalk": "^5.6.2",
    "chokidar": "^5.0.0",
    "commander": "^14.0.3",
    "electron-store": "^10.1.0",
    "electron-updater": "^6.0.0",
    "fflate": "^0.8.3",
    "gray-matter": "^4.0.3",

    "marked": "^18.0.4",
    "nanoid": "^5.1.11",
    "ora": "^9.4.0",
    "playwright": "^1.60.0",
    "prop-types": "^15.8.1",
    "react": "^19.2.6",
    "react-dom": "^19.2.6",
    "yaml": "^2.9.0",
    "zod": "^4.4.3"
  },
  "optionalDependencies": {
    "mammoth": "^1.12.0",
    "onnxruntime-node": "^1.26.0",
    "pdf-parse": "^2.4.5"
  },
  "devDependencies": {

./docs/sprint-11-analysis.md:26:- `electron-ui/ipc/handlers.cjs` registers channels with `ipcMain.handle(name, handler)`.
./docs/sprint-11-analysis.md:42:- A consistent request/reply pattern would use `ipcMain.handle('capture:response', ...)` and `ipcRenderer.invoke('capture:response', ...)`.
./docs/sprint-11-analysis.md:280:- ✅ All IPC handlers follow existing `ipcMain.handle` / `ipcRenderer.invoke` pattern (except `capture:response` which intentionally uses one-way `ipcMain.on` / `ipcRenderer.send` — documented in `capture-handlers.cjs`)
